title: Air China Cargo increases Chengdu service to daily flights from Glasgow Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Air China Cargo increases Chengdu service to daily flights from Glasgow Prestwick Airport. Air China Cargo has increased its cargo service between Prestwick and Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport, China.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Air China Cargo increases Chengdu service to daily flights from Glasgow Prestwick Airport
